# `nise profile`

- **Usage**: `nise profile <SUBCOMMAND>`
- **Source code**: [`src/cli/profile/mod.rs`](https://github.com/jdx/mise/blob/main/src/cli/profile/mod.rs)

Inspect and move nise profile generations

## Subcommands

- [`nise profile list [-J --json]`](/cli/profile/list.md)
- [`nise profile rollback [-J --json] [PROFILE] [GENERATION]`](/cli/profile/rollback.md)
- [`nise profile show [-J --json] [PROFILE]`](/cli/profile/show.md)

Examples:

```
$ nise profile list
$ nise profile show
$ nise profile rollback default 1
```
